nodes.label: Meera CSS Design Tokens (CSS Custom Properties)
nodes.norm_label: meera css design tokens (css custom properties)

properties.description: A Canva illustration asset showing 9 cartoon meerkat characters in different poses and expressions: neutral sitting, waving, speaking/sound, thinking, hands raised/happy, pondering with gear icons, pointing, greeting wave, and questioning with speech bubble. The meerkats are rendered in a cute flat-design style with sandy brown coloring and green grass patches. This appears to be a character reference sheet for the Meera AI assistant mascot.
design_decisions: consistent character design across all poses
expressions include: neutral, happy, thinking, questioning, waving, speaking
gear/sparkle icons used to indicate thinking/processing state
question mark speech bubble for confusion state
canva watermark visible on first character
properties.purpose: mascot character asset sheet for Meera AI assistant brand identity

nodes.label: Meera Mascot - Meerkat/Prairie Dog Character Illustration

properties.description: A flat-style vector illustration of a cute, friendly meerkat or prairie dog character sitting upright on green grass, waving with one paw raised. The character has a round body with warm tan/beige tones, dark brown eyes, small ears, and a friendly smile. The illustration uses a flat design aesthetic with simple shapes and limited shading, typical of a mascot or brand character. This appears to be the Meera application mascot, likely named after or representing the app itself.
properties.color_palette: warm browns, tan, beige, dark brown accents, green grass

nodes.norm_label: meera mascot - meerkat/prairie dog character illustration

properties.description: A sprite sheet of four meerkat mascot illustrations representing different states or actions of the Meera AI assistant. Top-left: meerkat holding a clipboard/tablet with checkmarks (task completion or checklist state). Top-right: meerkat holding a clipboard with a user profile icon and green checkmark (user onboarding or identity verification state). Middle-left: meerkat with surrounding floating icons including a document, laptop, coin, medical cross, and ID card (multi-tool or feature overview state). Bottom-center: meerkat celebrating with arms raised and a green checkmark (success or completion state).
properties.design_purpose: UI mascot character for Meera AI support assistant, used to convey assistant states, onboarding steps, and feedback moments
properties.style: flat vector illustration, warm brown tones, friendly/approachable

nodes.label: Arena Field Battle Background
nodes.description: 2D casual game battle background scene featuring a pastel-colored outdoor arena field. Sandy foreground terrain with rolling soft green hills in the midground, a light teal gradient sky with faint horizontal cloud streaks, and two circular green grass patches with small plant sprouts placed in the foreground and midground. Visual style is flat gradient illustration typical of casual mobile or browser-based games. Used as a battle arena stage background.

nodes.label: Cobra Attack Sprite
nodes.description: Cartoon cobra character sprite in attack/coiled animation state. Friendly stylized snake with a round smiling face, orange/tan body coiled in an S-shape, teal-green dorsal stripe. Flat vector illustration style with soft shadows. Used as a battle character asset.

properties.description: A cartoon cobra character in a hurt/damaged animation state. The character has an orange-tan coiled snake body with a round, friendly face featuring rosy cheeks and a smile. Stars are displayed around the head indicating a dazed/hurt state (common in game hurt animations). The character wears a small teal/turquoise neck accessory. The art style is flat, soft, and minimal with a pastel color palette — consistent with a casual or educational game aesthetic.
properties.visual_style: flat cartoon, pastel colors, soft gradients

nodes.label: Mira Battle Idle - Player Character Sprite

properties.description: Flat vector illustration of a cute meerkat character in an idle battle stance. The meerkat is seated upright on a small patch of green grass, with one paw raised in a friendly wave gesture and the other resting on its belly. The character features a light tan/sandy body with a darker brown face, ears, and tail tip. The style is cartoonish and friendly with smooth gradients and rounded shapes, consistent with a casual or educational game aesthetic. Animation state is idle/resting pose.
properties.stance: seated upright, one paw raised waving

nodes.norm_label: mira battle idle - player character sprite

nodes.label: Meera Avatar Mascot
nodes.description: Cartoon meerkat character mascot. Flat vector-style illustration with warm sandy-brown tones, large dark eyes, small nose, and a friendly waving pose. Rounded, approachable design language consistent with a friendly AI assistant brand identity. Used as the public-facing avatar/logo for the Meera desktop AI support assistant application.
nodes.color_palette: sandy brown, warm beige, dark brown accents
nodes.usage_context: public asset, app mascot, brand avatar

nodes.label: Clipboard with User Profile and Checkmark
nodes.norm_label: clipboard with user profile and checkmark

nodes.label: Meera App Icon
nodes.description: SVG app icon for the Meera desktop AI support assistant. A large, detailed vector graphic used for brand identity across the application.

nodes.label: Meera Brand Identity
nodes.description: The visual brand identity of the Meera application expressed through its icon. Meera is a KPMG Academic Innovation Challenge desktop AI support assistant built with Next.js/Electron.

nodes.label: Meera App Favicon (SVG)
nodes.description: SVG favicon for the Meera application. 82x100px viewBox. Contains a stylized letter 'N' (or abstract character) rendered in solid black on transparent background. Two path elements: an outer rounded rectangular frame and an inner diagonal-stroke letterform. Represents the brand identity icon used in browser tabs and bookmarks.

nodes.label: File Document Icon
nodes.description: A generic file/document icon rendered in SVG. Shows a folded-corner page shape with three horizontal lines representing text content. Filled in grey (#666). 16x16 viewbox. Used as a UI icon to represent files or documents in the application interface.

properties.description: Official Next.js wordmark/logo in SVG format, black fill, used for brand identity in the Meera Next.js application

nodes.label: Window Icon SVG
nodes.description: SVG icon depicting a desktop application window with a title bar containing three circular window control buttons (traffic light style). Used as a UI icon to represent a window or desktop application context within the Meera app.

properties.description: A speech bubble with a headset-wearing support agent icon appears beside the mascot, indicating AI support assistant context
Meerkat mascot is surrounded by floating service icons connected by dotted lines
The groundhog/marmot mascot holds a clipboard prop in front of its body

properties.note: Globe icon commonly represents internationalization (i18n), global/worldwide scope, or internet/web

links.label: Next.js framework logo used in project
